label: father
groundingNote: someone of one kind: a {urn:molecule-v0:man|man} [m]; because this someone did something with a {urn:molecule-v0:woman|woman} [m] before a {urn:molecule-v0:child|child} [m] was {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born}, it was {urn:kernel-v0:birth|born}; at many times this someone lives with it for a long time, does many good things for it
notes: NSM universal molecule 'father'. Depth 4 (man -> woman -> child chain) — at the gist rule-5 cap, deliberately.
